Three types of machine learning

- Unsupervised, like clustering
- Supervised, categorising
- Reinforcement, self driving cars, medical AI bots

Agentic AI that focuses on autonomous systems that can make decision and perform tasks. Often use RL.

Group 3 healthcare

[9 Reinforcement Learning Real-Life Applications](https://www.v7labs.com/blog/reinforcement-learning-applications)

Most learning is unsupervised learning

Reinforcement learning is the closest to human learning

![Deep Reinforcement Learning applications](data:image/png;base64,)

DeepTraffic is an opens-source environment for cars or drones

Google have used ML to reduce energy consumption for cooling at data centres by 40%

Used deep Q-learning

Healthcare

RL has been used in implementing dynamic treatment regimes(DTRs) for patients with long-erm illnesses.

Also used in automated medical diagnosis, health resource scheduling, drug discovery and development and health management

![Reinforcement Learning in healthcare applications](data:image/png;base64,)

RL used for medical report generation, identification of nodules.tumors and blood vessel blockages, analysis of reports

DTRs  used for determining treatment type, drug dosages and appointment timing tailored to an individual based on medical history.

Da Vinvi allows surgeons to perform complex procedures with greater flexibility and control

Selection of treatment is difficult - effective medication is a challenge, especially for chronic patients with little improvement over time.

Many patients try multiple treatments before giving up

= need for personalized medicine.

Also used in automated medical diagnosis, health resource scheduling, drug discovery and development and health management

RL uses in healthcare:

Dynamic Treatment Regimes (DTRs).

DTRs tailor treatment plans—drug types, dosages, and timing—based on individual patient histories and evolving conditions.

ICU Decision Support: RL helps manage critically ill patients where traditional clinical trial data is lacking.

Robotic Surgery: Surgical bots like Da Vinci use RL to improve precision, reduce errors, and enhance surgeon control with real-time feedback and 3D visualization.

RL is often used in robotics

[Starting on the Right Foot with Reinforcement Learning | Boston Dynamics](https://bostondynamics.com/blog/starting-on-the-right-foot-with-reinforcement-learning/)

[Everything You Should Know About Reinforcement Learning](https://www.spiceworks.com/tech/artificial-intelligence/articles/what-is-reinforcement-learning/)

Discount factor is to account for potential unforeseen events
